title: Paxos $300 Trillion Oopsie
relevance_summary: Internal transfer with incorrect decimal places resulting in creation of $300 trillion

prevention.rule: Block any tx that involves large transfers with incorrect decimal places

red_flags: Incorrect decimal places in large transfer
monitoring_rules: Block any tx that involves large transfers with incorrect decimal places
summary: A routine internal transfer at Paxos resulted in the creation of $300 trillion due to incorrect decimal places. A guard could have detected and blocked such transactions by monitoring for large transfers with incorrect decimal places.
